mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.name, a.description, t.name AS typeName, a.type_id AS typeId, a.user_id AS userId, u.username, a.method, a.endpoint, a.request_params AS requestParamsJson, a.response_params AS responseParamsJson, a.price, a.price_unit AS priceUnit, a.call_limit AS callLimit, a.status, a.rating, a.invoke_count AS invokeCount, a.success_count AS successCount, a.fail_count AS failCount, a.create_time AS createTime, a.update_time AS updateTime, a.doc_url AS docUrl, f.create_time AS favoriteTime FROM api_favorite f LEFT JOIN api_info a ON f.api_id = a.id LEFT JOIN api_type t ON a.type_id = t.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
